build.beforeDevCommand: npm run sidecar:build && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run sidecar:build && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:8787
